subject: [PATCH 15/24] nfsd: apply the notify mask to the delegation when requested

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch modifies the NFSv4 server to apply the requested notification mask to the delegation when a client requests a directory delegation with notifications enabled. The patch ensures that if the client doesn't set the NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND flag, no notifications are offered, as the server won't provide necessary information for classic notifications. The patch also defines a constant for supported notify masks and updates the get_dir_delegation function to apply the requested notification mask.
